_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY HYDRODACTYL PANEL
name: NeoForge
author: support@pterodactyl.io
description: NeoForge is a fork of Forge focused on separating the Minecraft modding ecosystem from the Forge name and legacy. Uses the itzg/minecraft-server Docker image.

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
# NeoForge installation script
# itzg/docker-minecraft-server handles server jar download at container start
mkdir -p /mnt/server

variables.name: Server Type
variables.description: The type of Minecraft server to run. Fixed for this egg.

variables.name: Minecraft Version
variables.description: The version of Minecraft to run. Set to LATEST for the latest release, or specify a version number (e.g., 1.20.4).

variables.name: Max Memory
variables.description: Maximum memory allocated to the Java heap (e.g., 2G, 4096M).

variables.name: Difficulty
variables.description: The difficulty level of the server.

variables.name: Game Mode
variables.description: Default game mode for new players.

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum number of players that can join the server.

variables.name: Message of the Day
variables.description: The MOTD displayed in the server list.

variables.name: Online Mode
variables.description: Whether to authenticate players with Mojang servers. Set FALSE for offline/cracked servers.

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: The internal server name used for the world folder and level-name property.

variables.name: Enable RCON
variables.description: Enable RCON for remote server administration.

variables.name: Override Server Properties
variables.description: Allow environment variables to override server.properties values.
